title: StockMarket
description: StockMarket is a Minecraft mod that brings a better way for trading to the game. It enables players to trade items on a virtual stock market, making it ideal for multiplayer servers with active economies.
body:
# Stock Market Mod ## About StockMarket is a Minecraft mod that brings a better way for trading to the game. It enables players to trade items on a virtual stock market, making it ideal for multiplayer servers with active economies. For Server that have not enough players or even for single player, a market bot can be added that simulates a large player base and provides liquidity to the market. ## Features * Adds a realistic trading system to the game * Custom trading pairs can be defined * A list of preconfigured trading pairs are ready to be activated to avoid long parameter tweaking. * Players have real impact on the price movement. * Adds new blocks to interact with the market. * Implementation of a matching engine inspired by the real market. * Configurable bot which provides the market with liquidity and volatility. ## Please visit the repository for more infos and full documentation **[Stock Market Mod Repository](https://github.com/KROIA/StockMarket)** ## Searching for test servers I'm searching for servers who are willing to test this mod =) I'm open for feedback and help for improvement. Join the discord: [https://discord.gg/qHNVaDGAyB](https://discord.gg/qHNVaDGAyB) to get access to the development builds I'm currently working on or to bring some Ideas I could add to the mod. =) Both server and client deeds to install the mod. Versions 1.2.0 and above need some dependencies: * [Bank System Mod](https://github.com/KROIA/BankSystem) * [Architectury](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api) * [Quilted Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/qsl) (Only needed for Quilt) * [Mod Utilities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modutilities) (Only needed for Quilt) * [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) (Only needed for Fabric) *** ## Easy access to the available markets and price visualisazion.
*** ## Create your desired trading pairs. (Admins)
*** ## Use the preconfigured preset pairs that are already parameterized. (Admins)
*** ## Change the behavior of the market at any time. (Admins)
